name: Platja de Sant Tomàs
description: A broad beach of golden sand and calm water, with beach bars, hotels, and full services. Comfortable and accessible, it serves as the walking gateway to Binigaus to the west and links to the Camí de Cavalls.

highlights: enjoy an easy swim on a wide beach of golden sand with full facilities
eat grilled fish at the Es Bruc beach restaurant, right by the sand
use it as a gateway on foot to the unspoilt Binigaus
